query: /loop keep fixing until the unit tests pass
expected_behavior: Defines goal, an objective success criterion (dotnet test exits 0), and a hard max_iterations
Creates state/loop/<id>.json and updates it each round
Runs Plan→Act→Verify→Decide, measuring tests each round (delegates to testing/dotnet-test-run)
Stops on success or hard limit with a final report

query: /loop reduce the review findings to zero high severity (max 3 rounds)
expected_behavior: Sets max_iterations to 3 and the criterion to 0 high findings
Stops after 3 rounds even if not met, with a standstill report
Never weakens the criterion to appear done
Stops with a 'no-progress' or 'blocker' report if two rounds show no measurable improvement
Does not exceed the hard iteration limit
